scenario_memberships.title: Active objective plus ERT and Taupe
Active plus promoted NMR, ERT, and Taupe

interpretation: Each package subdirectory is a copied scenario winner with mesh, objective summaries, and field statistics.
The packages are conditional alternatives, not a final all-measurement inversion field.
Selection remains unstable until NMR promotion and ERT/Taupe/RH/other-HM gates are resolved or explicitly excluded.
